title: peltophorum racemosum
intro: Peltophorum racemosum, also known as the blackbead tree or black-bead tree, is a flowering tree native to the tropical regions of Australia and Asia. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Peltophorum racemosum include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used in infusions, decoctions, and ointments to leverage its medicinal properties.
